Virtual Assistant Needed (Spanish Speakers - Beginners Welcome!)

  • Doesn't Match Skills

  • The client will not be notified. Your feedback helps us improve job search.
Hourly: $10-$20 - Entry level - Est. Time: 3 to 6 months, Less than 30 hrs/week
We are looking for motivated Spanish-speaking Virtual Assistants to join our remote team. This opportunity is perfect for beginners who want to start working online and gain valuable experience. Your main tasks will include responding to simple messages in Spanish, organizing basic information, and assisting with daily administrative support. No advanced skills are required — just basic Spanish communication and a willingness to learn. You’ll receive clear instructions and ongoing support, making it easy to get started even if you have no prior experience.

Posted 4 hours ago

Frontend Programmer (HTML, CSS, JS, Bootstrap, Vue) - NO AI

  • Just not interested
  • Vague Description
  • Unrealistic Expectations
  • Too Many Applicants
  • Job posted too long ago
  • Poor reviews about the client
  • Doesn't Match Skills
  • I am overqualified
  • Budget too low
  • Not in my preferred location
  • The client will not be notified. Your feedback helps us improve job search.
Hourly: $5-$8 - Entry level - Est. Time: More than 6 months, Less than 30 hrs/week
I am looking for a "Project Finisher" - a frontend programmer who will take nearly-complete projects and polish them, finishing them off. This is primarily a frontend programming job, using HTML, CSS, JS, Bootstrap, and Vue. The person I'm looking for has a good eye for design and can improve the look of a website to a finished product with or without a figma design. This is a long term job. I have a specific testing/development process that is cumbersome and complicated. It is not a "normal" IDE development experience. This job is for someone willing to learn a new set of tools and testing process. It is slower and takes longer than normal IDE development. I am extremely tired of "developers" who are delivering AI code. If you use AI to code for this job and I see "AI slop" in your code, then I will terminate the job immediately with low feedback. This job will require doing a sample project. The sample project will be paid at a low fixed rate and includes the learning of how to use the development/testing process. If the sample project is not completed, then it will not be paid. This sample process allows me to evaluate multiple candidates and choose who I want to work with. In your application, say "weird way to test". The backend uses Visual Studio, .NET, C#. But since you are doing frontend programming, I am not sure you will need to do any of that. ------ To apply, answer these questions ------- Answer in your own words. If you use AI to answer these questions I will delete your application. 1. Your name, geographic location, and the hours in California time that you can meet 2. Can you work and meet on a daily basis? I prefer someone who can work and meet even briefly every day, rather than someone who does a lot of work a few times a week. 3. Do you understand this job requires a custom coding process and testing process? 4. Do you understand that if you use AI to do this job and I find "AI slop" then I will terminate the job and give you low feedback? 5. Do you agree to a low paid sample project? 6. Explain to me what a quality website frontend is and how you would make it 7. Attach some of your design and/or programming work (branding, websites, etc.) Tell me specifically what you did for each project that you attach 8. Is there anything else you would like to add for me to consider?
Skills
